Container.Name: stockinfo
Container.Overview: StockInfo provides stock and ETF quotes via a REST API (JSON), caches them in a SQLite database and refreshes them periodically. Backend (FastAPI) and dashboard (Vue) run in a single image on one port — the dashboard is served at the root URL, the API under /quote, /instruments, etc. Data sources: yfinance (Yahoo), justETF, OpenFIGI.[br][br]Timezone: the "Timezone" setting (TZ) defaults to UTC — set it to your local zone for correct log timestamps. Valid values (TZ identifier column): https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/List_of_tz_database_time_zones[br][br]OpenFIGI (optional): resolves an ISIN to the ticker at your preferred exchange (see "Default exchange"). It works without an API key, but only within OpenFIGI's low anonymous rate limit — once exceeded, resolution falls back to Yahoo search, which may return a different exchange or currency. A free key raises the limit and makes resolution reliable; enter it under "OpenFIGI API key". Register and create a key: https://www.openfigi.com/api
Container.Description: StockInfo provides stock and ETF quotes via a REST API (JSON), caches them in a SQLite database and refreshes them periodically. Backend and dashboard in a single container.

Config.Name: WebUI Port
Config.Description: Host port for dashboard + API (container listens internally on 8000).

Config.Name: Data (Cache DB)
Config.Description: Persistent path for the SQLite cache DB (survives container updates).

Config.Name: Refresh interval (hours)
Config.Description: Interval of the periodic background refresh of all instruments.

Config.Name: Cache TTL (hours)
Config.Description: Age at which a quote is re-fetched on request.

Config.Name: Metadata TTL (days)
Config.Description: Refresh cycle for ETF metadata (TER, provider …).

Config.Name: Default exchange (MIC)
Config.Description: Preferred exchange for ISIN lookups, e.g. XETR (Xetra).

Config.Name: OpenFIGI API key
Config.Description: Optional key for a higher OpenFIGI rate limit (empty = without).

Config.Name: Timezone
Config.Description: Container timezone for log timestamps. Default UTC — set your local zone, e.g. Europe/Vienna or America/New_York.
